presets.name: Ideogram — App Icon Set
presets.basePrompt: [Text: "Fit" in bold rounded font] [Subject: abstract human figure in motion, geometric] [Style: app icon, flat design, gradient blue to purple, 1024x1024] [Exclude: texturing, shadows, complex details]

presets.name: GPT Image 2 — Landing Page Hero
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: SaaS dashboard mockup on floating laptop] [Environment: gradient background, subtle grid pattern] [Text: "Analytics Reimagined" in bold sans-serif, "Real-time insights for modern teams" in light weight below] [Style: modern SaaS landing page, clean, professional] [Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, readable at 1200px wide, no clutter] [Use case: Website hero section]

presets.name: Gemini Nano — Design System
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: complete design system components: buttons, inputs, cards, toggles, dropdowns] [Environment: clean white canvas with grid] [Style: Material Design 3, rounded corners, elevation shadows] [Text: "Primary", "Secondary", "Disabled" labels] [Exclude: decorative elements, photos]

presets.name: FLUX — 3D Render
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: sleek wireless charger, matte white with copper accent ring] [Environment: minimalist desk setup, soft shadow] [Camera: 3/4 angle, macro detail] [Lighting: softbox, clean reflections] [Style: product 3D render, Octane, photorealistic] [Exclude: fingerprints, dust, clutter]

presets.name: MAI 2 — Packaging Design
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: luxury perfume box, black matte with gold foil embossing] [Environment: marble surface, soft ambient light] [Text: "NOIR" in elegant serif, embossed] [Style: premium packaging, unboxing aesthetic, tactile materials] [Camera: top-down flat lay] [Exclude: plastic, bright colors]
